sprint: Shapes Multi-Stroke Line/Circle + Fill Toggle; Doodle Panel Reorg
task: Two direct follow-ups: 'can we do same for shapes under draw your own. multi stroke. shapes stroke should be regular line or circular. give option for just outline shape of colored shape.' and 'the doodle right panel needs reorgnisation. the drawing area can be the first thing. the color selector can be just [swatches].' Shapes: shape:'custom''s pad is upgraded from a single forced-closed freehand path into a real drawing tool -- a Line/Circle Tool picker decides what the next drag commits, each completed drag appends one {type,p0,p1} entry to a new st.customStrokes array (never replaces it), so a shape can combine several straight edges and circles. New _buildCustomStrokePath/_drawCustomStrokeShape in renderer/slideRenderer.js build one combined path per shape -- consecutive connected Line strokes chain into a real continuous subpath (so a closed loop of Lines fills correctly), a Circle stroke is always its own separate closed subpath -- deliberately separate from _layerDrawShape, left completely untouched for legacy customPath and every World-owned Layer Pack decoration. A universal Fill Shape toggle (st.fillEnabled, any Shape kind) gates whether fill() runs at all -- genuinely outline-only, not a 0%-opacity trick -- with Fill Colour/Opacity hidden while off; Outline stays always visible. Doodle: js/cardDesigner.js's Doodle group DOM order changed to Hint -> Draw pad -> Pen Tools (compact swatches + thickness) -> Undo/Clear, the pad now the group's own first, largest element; per 'just swatches' the separate custom colour-picker input was removed outright, leaving only the 8-swatch palette. Verified via a new Playwright test (shape_multistroke_test.js): 3 connected Line strokes that close back to their own start render as one real filled triangle; adding a Circle preserves the prior Lines (genuine multi-stroke); Undo Last removes exactly the most recent stroke; toggling Fill Shape off persists fillEnabled:false and the triangle's own interior pixel genuinely stops being the fill colour; Clear All empties customStrokes; Object Strip renders a real canvas thumbnail. doodle_test.js gained a DOM-order assertion and its stale colour-picker-present check was corrected to absent; shapes_text_test.js's older single-freehand-drag assertion was updated to match the upgraded pad's real behaviour (a plain drag now commits one Line stroke, by design). Full regression across the entire existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform Playwright suite (same pre-existing, already-disclosed failures confirmed via git stash against the unmodified baseline, unrelated to this change) and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder change.
